title: Streamlit What-If — technique sweep
intent: Open the What-If page, set a manual baseline, pick INT4 + KV-FP8, and inspect the side-by-side bars, verdict, and citations table.

steps.intent: What-If page loaded; baseline defaults to latest Planner result with a manual-entry fallback.
Switched to manual baseline; four numeric inputs expose weights/KV/prefill/runtime MB.
Technique picker opened: INT4, INT8, KV-FP8, KV-INT4, LoRA, REAP, SpecDecode, FlashAttn3 available.
Plotly grouped bar chart shows baseline vs candidate per band (Weights, KV, Prefill, Runtime).
Verdict banner summarises the delta; citations table lists arXiv papers backing each technique.
